Shayna Dubbin, 415-586-8793, plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
The parties appeared in this matter-no argument. The Court clarified and adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TANIA PUSHKAROW'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend, no timely opposition filed (opposition was filed on March 23rd, only two court days before the hearing). Order signed. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
